channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Celtics withstand 3-point spree to beat the Pistons 130-120
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Jaylen Brown had 28 points with nine assists and Kristaps Porzingis added 26 points and nine rebounds to lead the Boston Celtics to their ninth victory in 10 games, a 130-120 victory over the Detroit Pistons on Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: JIMMY GOLEN, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: McNeeley scores 17 points as No. 25 UConn rallies to a 76-72 win over No. 15 Baylor
item.description: Liam McNeeley scored 17 points and No. 25 UConn came back from an early deficit to beat No. 15 Baylor 76-72 in the Big 12-Big East Battle.
item.dc:creator: Jim Fuller, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Gymnast Simone Biles vows to 'never' return to Pilates class, cites difficulty with first experience
item.description: Superstar gymnast Simone Biles documented her first post-Olympics workout on her social media platform, saying the Pilates class she participated in was "too hard.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Michigan flipped QB Bryce Underwood with some help from Oracle founder Larry Ellison and Tom Brady
item.description: Bryce Underwood was relieved to make his commitment to Michigan official with his signature as signing day in college football kicked off on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Larry Lage, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: League upholds 3-game suspension for Houston LB Azeez Al-Shaair following hit on Trevor Lawrence
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The NFL and the NFL players association upheld Houston linebacker Azeez Al-Shaair's three-game suspension without pay for repeated violations of player safety rules following his violent hit to the head of Jacksonville’s Trevor Lawrence, who sustained a concussion and is now on injur
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Matt Eberflus' dismissal from Bears came after 's--- show' postgame locker room speech: report
item.description: The Chicago Bears moved on from Matt Eberflus as head coach, but it didn't come before a tense locker room moment following yet another head-scratching loss for the group.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Liverpool's lead cut in Premier League and Man City ends slump. Chelsea and Arsenal win
item.description: MANCHESTER, England (AP) — Liverpool’s lead at the top of the Premier League was cut to seven points after a thrilling 3-3 draw with Newcastle on Wednesday. Chelsea moved up to second by thrashing last-place Southampton 5-1, while Arsenal is third after a 2-0 win over Manchester United.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Pro Picks: Falcons will upset the Vikings in Kirk Cousins' return to Minnesota
item.description: Pro Picks is a weekly column where AP Pro Football Writer Rob Maaddi shares his picks for upcoming games. For all previous Pro Picks, head here. ___ Six division matchups and Kirk Cousins’ return to Minnesota highlight a lighter Week 14 schedule.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Flames honor Johnny Gaudreau, welcome his family back to Calgary in emotional pre-game tribute
item.description: The Calgary Flames paid tribute to longtime star Johnny Gaudreau on Tuesday night before their game against the Columbus Blue Jackets, months after the All-Star was killed while biking on a New Jersey road this summer.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Juan Soto starting to eliminate teams from negotiations, agent Scott Boras says
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Juan Soto is starting to drop teams from negotiations ahead of baseball's winter meetings next week. Likely to approach or set a record contract, the free agent slugger has met with the New York Yankees, New York Mets, Los Angeles Dodgers, Boston Red Sox and Toronto Blue Jays.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Chicago Sky, Angel Reese to open 2025 season against Indiana Fever, Caitlin Clark
item.description: Angel Reese and Caitlin Clark won't have to wait long to renew their rivalry during the next WNBA season.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Kyrie Irving scores 30 to lead Dallas past Jazz, 106-94
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Kyrie Irving went for 30 points, as the Dallas Mavericks beat the Utah Jazz for a second time this season, 106-94.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utes women upset #3 Notre Dame, 78-67
item.description: GEORGE TOWN, CAYMAN ISLANDS — The Utah women's basketball team picked up their highest ranked win outside of the Huntsman Center in school history by taking down No. 3 Notre Dame, 78-67, in the final game of the Cayman Island Classic.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Chicago Bears fire head coach Matt Eberflus
item.description: The Chicago Bears have fired head coach Matt Eberflus following a six-game losing streak, with offensive coordinator Thomas Brown serving as interim coach.
item.dc:creator: Marisa Rodriguez, WGN 9

item.title: Lions beat Bears 23-20 to extend win streak to 10 games
item.description: DETROIT (AP) — Jared Goff threw two touchdown passes to Sam LaPorta, Jake Bates made three field goals in the first half and the Detroit Lions held off the Chicago Bears 23-20 on Thursday to extend their winning streak to 10 games. The Lions snapped a seven-game losing streak on Thanksgiving.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9
